emails.subject: Trust friction
emails.body: Hi Alex, as Notion scales into enterprise, security questionnaires and trust verification become a bottleneck. Most product-led companies underestimate how much this slows deal cycles.

emails.subject: The enterprise blocker
emails.body: Alex, enterprise buyers want proof of security posture before they sign. If trust verification is manual and slow, it's adding weeks to every deal. That's revenue sitting in the pipeline.

emails.subject: How a SaaS company solved it
emails.body: A productivity SaaS similar to Notion automated their trust verification process. Enterprise deal cycles shortened by 3 weeks on average. Their security team got 15 hours back per month.

emails.subject: Relevant data
emails.body: Alex, compiled data on how product-led SaaS companies handle enterprise trust requirements. Might be useful as Notion pushes upmarket. Interested?

emails.subject: Final thought
emails.body: Alex, totally understand if this isn't a priority right now. If enterprise trust verification ever becomes a focus, happy to share what we're seeing work. Best of luck with Notion's growth.
